titleStmt.title: SII 30.45: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 45. (A.R. No. 122 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 3: 12th c. A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. It contains the royal order addressed to two Śivabrāhmaṇās of Āḷuḍaiyār temple at Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi. It appears that during the rule of his younger brother certain Murugāṇḍāṉ deposited some amount and tried to make the kāṇi right of the two priests null and void. The aggrieved persons appealed to the king who restored their right after they deposited fifteen achchu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉac cakkaravatti koneriṉmai(l)
koṇṭān vaṭaparicāra nāṭṭil Āḷuṭaiyār tirumuruka
npūṇṭi Āḷuṭaiyār koyil civappirāmaṇaril civanpiḷ
ḷai nāyanāṉa ponṉampala nampikkum ponnaṉ pukaliventa
nukkum nam Ōlai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu yināyanār koyil
civabrāmaṇak kāṇi taṅkaḷutu mātaṅkaḷ (pe)pecik kalve
ṭṭu muṇṭāyirukkat tampiyārnāḷile murukāṇṭān
Accu vaittu taṅkāṇiyai Aḻivu ceykaiyāle
tara namakku munṟāvatu nāḷile nampakkale Eṅkā
ṇi Eṅkaḷukku Ākavaraṇumenṟu namakku tarum Accu pat
tum toṇṭaimāṉ peṟuvari muṟaimaikku Accu Añcum Āka
Accu pataṉañcum tāṅkaḷ vaikkaiyil Ikkoyi
ppi maraikkāṇiyum pū
ttiyaṅkaḷuma raiva ..
Digital edition of SII 30.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
